texto: Once there was an elephant,Who tried to use the telephant-No! no! I mean an elephoneHe tried to use the telephone-(Dear me! I am not certain quiteThat even now I've got it right.)Howe'er it was, he got his trunkEntangled in the telephunk;The more he tried to get it free, The louder buzzed the telephee-(I fear I'd better drop the songOf elephop and telephong!)
explicacao: Citação de Laura Elizabeth Richards sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “Once there was an elephant,Who tried to use the telephant-No! no! I mean an elephoneHe tried to u…” articula humor, clever, funny em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como funny e hilarious.
